_note: News / share-outs for CECS faculty through the year. Add a new object to the top of 'posts'. 'date' is YYYY-MM-DD. 'body' may contain basic HTML.

posts.title: Committee recruiting for 2026–2027 is open
posts.body: We're recruiting CECS faculty to fill open Faculty Senate committee seats for the 2026–2027 year. Several committees have open seats right now — including the Faculty Center for Teaching and Learning Advisory Committee, Graduate Policy Committee, Personnel Committee, Research Council, and University Travel Awards Committee. Browse the committees and add your name on the volunteer form.
